name: Jordan Hoekstra
abilities: ★ The Scratch — one of only two men the Open grants no strokes. Makes par in his sleep and posts a gross nobody else can touch. "I'd shoot 45 more shots than Jordie."
The One Weakness. Can make par; cannot finish a rye and coke. One drink and the master folds like a cheap suit and slips off home. Index scratched down 3 → 0 → 2.
flavor: “Can't finish a rye and coke, but can make par.”
caption: Jordan Hoekstra · The Mycelium Syndicate 🍄
